mapper.select: select * from community_notice where status = '0' order by is_top desc, publish_time desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
select count(*) from community_notice where status = '0'
select count(*) from community_notice where status = '0' and (read_count is null or read_count = 0)
select * from community_notice where status = '0' and (read_count is null or read_count = 0)
mapper.update: update community_notice set notice_title = #{noticeTitle}, notice_content = #{noticeContent}, notice_type = #{noticeType}, read_count = #{readCount}, status = #{status}, is_top = #{topFlag}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, publish_user_id = #{publishUserId}, publish_user_name = #{publishUserName}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark}, more_info = #{moreInfo} where id = #{id}
